{{Quote|Lancer squadron! We're sure glad to see you!|[[Rand Talor]], during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Seizure of Coruscant]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
'''Lancer Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that served with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Equipped with [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]], the squadron participated in the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]].
